Anodize uses `.anodize.yaml` (or `.anodize.toml`) in your project root.

## Top-Level Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `after` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `announce` | AnnounceConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `before` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `binary_signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Binary-specific signing configs (same shape as `signs` but only for binary artifacts). |
| `changelog` | ChangelogConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `crates` | list of CrateConfig | `[]` |  |
| `defaults` | Defaults | ‚Äî |  |
| `dist` | string | `./dist` |  |
| `docker_signs` | list of DockerSignConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `env` | map | ‚Äî |  |
| `env_files` | list of string | ‚Äî | List of .env files to load before template expansion. |
| `includes` | list of string | ‚Äî |  |
| `nightly` | NightlyConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `partial` | PartialConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `project_name` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `publishers` | list of PublisherConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `release` | ReleaseConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `report_sizes` | bool | ‚Äî |  |
| `sbom` | SbomConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` |  |
| `snapshot` | SnapshotConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `source` | SourceConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `tag` | TagConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `upx` | list of UpxConfig | `[]` |  |
| `version` | integer | ‚Äî | Schema version. Currently supports 1 (implicit default) and 2. |
| `workspaces` | list of WorkspaceConfig | ‚Äî |  |

## `after`

Top-level lifecycle hooks for `before` and `after` blocks. Each block has `pre` and `post` lists of hook commands that run around the entire pipeline (not individual stages).

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `post` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî |  |
| `pre` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî |  |

## `announce`

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `bluesky` | BlueskyAnnounce | ‚Äî | Bluesky announcement configuration. |
| `discord` | DiscordAnnounce | ‚Äî | Discord announcement configuration. |
| `discourse` | DiscourseAnnounce | ‚Äî | Discourse announcement configuration. |
| `email` | EmailAnnounce | ‚Äî | Email announcement configuration. |
| `linkedin` | LinkedInAnnounce | ‚Äî | LinkedIn announcement configuration. |
| `mastodon` | MastodonAnnounce | ‚Äî | Mastodon announcement configuration. |
| `mattermost` | MattermostAnnounce | ‚Äî | Mattermost announcement configuration. |
| `opencollective` | OpenCollectiveAnnounce | ‚Äî | OpenCollective announcement configuration. |
| `reddit` | RedditAnnounce | ‚Äî | Reddit announcement configuration. |
| `skip` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Template-conditional skip: if rendered to "true", skip the entire announce stage. |
| `slack` | SlackAnnounce | ‚Äî | Slack announcement configuration. |
| `teams` | TeamsAnnounce | ‚Äî | Microsoft Teams announcement configuration. |
| `telegram` | TelegramAnnounce | ‚Äî | Telegram announcement configuration. |
| `twitter` | TwitterAnnounce | ‚Äî | Twitter/X announcement configuration. |
| `webhook` | WebhookConfig | ‚Äî | Generic webhook announcement configuration. |

## `before`

Top-level lifecycle hooks for `before` and `after` blocks. Each block has `pre` and `post` lists of hook commands that run around the entire pipeline (not individual stages).

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `post` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî |  |
| `pre` | list of HookEntry | ‚Äî |  |

## `changelog`

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `abbrev` | integer | ‚Äî | Hash abbreviation length. Default: 7. Set to -1 to omit the hash entirely. |
| `disable` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Disable changelog generation. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional disable). |
| `filters` | ChangelogFilters | ‚Äî |  |
| `footer` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `format` | string | ‚Äî | Template for each changelog commit line. Available variables: SHA (full hash), ShortSHA (abbreviated), Message (commit subject), AuthorName, AuthorEmail, Login (per-commit GitHub username, `github` backend only), Logins (comma-separated list of all GitHub usernames in the release, `github` backend only). Default: `"{{ ShortSHA }} {{ Message }}"` |
| `groups` | list of ChangelogGroup | ‚Äî |  |
| `header` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `sort` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `use` | string | ‚Äî | Changelog source: `"git"` (default), `"github"`, or `"github-native"`. `"github"` fetches commits via the GitHub API, enriching entries with author login information (available as the `Logins` template variable). `"github-native"` delegates entirely to GitHub's auto-generated notes. |

## `nightly`

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî | Template for the release name. Default: "{{ .ProjectName }}-nightly" |
| `tag_name` | string | ‚Äî | Tag name used for the nightly release. Default: "nightly" |

## `partial`

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `by` | string | ‚Äî | How to split builds: "goos" (by OS, default) or "target" (by full triple). "goos" groups all arch variants for the same OS into one split job. "target" gives each unique target triple its own split job. |

## `release`

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `disable` | StringOrBool | ‚Äî | Disable the release stage. Accepts bool or template string (e.g. `"{{ if IsSnapshot }}true{{ endif }}"` for conditional disable). GoReleaser supports template strings here since v1.15.0. |
| `discussion_category_name` | string | ‚Äî | GitHub Discussion category name for the release. |
| `draft` | bool | ‚Äî |  |
| `extra_files` | list of ExtraFileSpec | ‚Äî |  |
| `footer` | ContentSource | ‚Äî |  |
| `github` | GitHubConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `header` | ContentSource | ‚Äî |  |
| `ids` | list of string | ‚Äî | Artifact IDs filter for uploads. |
| `include_meta` | bool | ‚Äî | Upload metadata.json and artifacts.json as release assets. |
| `make_latest` | object | ‚Äî |  |
| `mode` | string | ‚Äî | Release mode: "keep-existing", "append", "prepend", or "replace". |
| `name_template` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `prerelease` | object | ‚Äî |  |
| `replace_existing_artifacts` | bool | ‚Äî |  |
| `replace_existing_draft` | bool | ‚Äî |  |
| `skip_upload` | bool | ‚Äî |  |
| `target_commitish` | string | ‚Äî | Target branch or SHA for the release tag. |
| `use_existing_draft` | bool | ‚Äî | Reuse an existing draft release instead of creating a new one. |

## `workspaces`

A workspace represents an independent project root within a monorepo. Each workspace has its own crates, changelog, and release configuration, allowing independently-versioned components that aren't Cargo workspace members.

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `after` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `before` | HooksConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `binary_signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` | Binary-specific signing configs (same shape as `signs` but only for binary artifacts). |
| `changelog` | ChangelogConfig | ‚Äî |  |
| `crates` | list of CrateConfig | `[]` |  |
| `env` | map | ‚Äî |  |
| `name` | string | ‚Äî |  |
| `signs` | list of SignConfig | `[]` |  |
